title: Rubroshorea johorensis
intro: Rubroshorea johorensis, also known as Red Shorea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dipterocarpaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may aid in the treatment of various health conditions such as wounds, infections, and oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Rubroshorea johorensis include flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Rubroshorea johorensis is commonly used in traditional medicine and is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, although its use is primarily limited to local and folk medicine.
